name: memory-compiler
description: Skills for Cole Medin's Claude Memory Compiler: `setup` clones the memory-compiler repo (upstream, a fork, or a custom URL) and wires its hooks into a project; `migrate` swaps an existing install's origin to a different memory-compiler repo and fast-forwards; `show-compile-progress` replaces the empty popup window during end-of-day compile with a visible banner, spinner, and live step log.
